vllm.title: [bugfix] respect distributed_executor_backend in world_size=1
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: found by the RLHF community, see OpenRLHF/OpenRLHF#721 . even when the world size is 1, we should respect the distributed_executor_backend specified from users.

vllm.title: [Misc] Add offline test for disaggregated prefill
vllm.author: Shaoting-Feng

vllm.title: [misc]  Add LoRA to benchmark_serving
vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add the ability to benchmark LoRA models via benchmark_serving.py
Example:
server command :
vllm serve  meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-hf --enable-lora --max-loras 4 --max-lora-rank 8 --lora-modules "sql-lora-0"="yard1/llama-2-7b-sql-lora-test" "sql-lora-1"="yard1/llama-2-7b-sql-lora-test" "sql-lora-2"="yard

vllm.title: [Misc] Log time consumption on weight downloading
vllm.author: waltforme
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR tries to give some visibility to the time used on downloading weights from HF.
This tiny feature allows us to quantitatively understand the performance gain of local cache, thus can greatly help us to evaluate (and optimize) the performance of the engine.
FIX #12916

vllm.title: [CI] Resolve transformers-neuronx version conflict
vllm.author: liangfu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #12851
This PR is trying to fix a number of neuron backend testing issues:

fix permission error: rm: cannot remove '/root/.cache/huggingface/*': Permission denied
resolve transformers-neuronx==0.13.* package version conflict with transformers==2.48.2; current solution is to: 1/ uninstall transf

vllm.title: [Doc] Correct HF repository for TeleChat2 models
vllm.author: waltforme
vllm.bodyExcerpt: There should be a - in the HF repository names (see https://huggingface.co/Tele-AI).

vllm.title: [Misc] Add qwen2.5-vl BNB support
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #12604 (comment)

Add tp compatible BNB support to Qwen2.5-VL models.

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Auto-fix Markdown files
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Update the pre-commit hook for pymarkdown:

Use fix command instead of the default scan (source) to automatically fix lint errors
Remove the unnecessary docs/ filter so that the lint rules are applied to all Markdown files in the repository.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Remove unused seq_group_metadata_list from ModelInputForGPU
vllm.author: ShangmingCai
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
While implementing the XpYd disaggregated prefilling feature, I found that the model_input.seq_group_metadata_list of model_input passed to the execute_model function in model_runner.py is always None.
Turn out the seq_group_metadata_list variable in class ModelInputForGPU is never initialized and u

vllm.title: [bugfix] fix early import of flash attention
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: the rlhf test example has been broken by #12807 , because it imports vllm flash attention too early.

vllm.title: [RFC] [Mistral] FP8 format
vllm.author: patrickvonplaten
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add FP8 format for Mistral models
Still need to run some tests but essentially the following should work:
from vllm import LLM
from vllm.sampling_params import SamplingParams

model_name = "mistralai/Mistral-Nemo-Instruct-2407-FP8"

sampling_params = SamplingParams(max_tokens=128)

llm = LLM(model=m

vllm.title: [V1] Cache `uses_mrope` in GPUModelRunner
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
model_config.uses_mrope reads the HF config every time it is called, causing unnecessary overhead.
This PR fixes this by caching the value in model runner.
